full_text:
Chen Gong (Gongtai) 陳宮 (公臺)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Chen Gong (陳宮), styledGongtai (公臺), was born in Dongjun. Talented advisor who served, and died with, Lü Bu. Helped Cao Cao in the novel. Chen Gong was affiliated with the Han Dynasty, the Wei Kingdom, and Lu Bu. Chen Gong lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
